calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Patricia G. Rosenberg, Esq., for the Plaintiff Oberti-Alessini Rental Account, a California General Partnership.
Witness Oberti Alessini sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Alex Arman dba Dollar Store and all other occupants in possession.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 2-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Court grants Plaintiff's Oral Motion to Amend Complaint to conform to Proof to Substitute Doe 1 for Defendant Arman Mohammed DBA Dollar King Store aka Arman Mohammed DBA King Dollar Store.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Oberti-Alessini Rental Account, a California General Partnership and against defendants Alex Arman dba Dollar Store and all other Occupants in Possession, Arman Mohammed DBA Dollar King Store aka Arman Mohammed DBA King Dollar Store as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1276 Market St, San Francisco, California 94108.

Damages $ 9004.08
Holdover damages $ 4200.00
Pre-judgment interest $
Attorney's Fees $ 17430.38
Costs $ 0
For a Total Judgment of $ 30,634.46

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Assigned To Trial Court
